name: Sendai Hakurei no Miko
description:
"Her name is not remembered, but older residents recall her being very talented in the role."

Hakurei Setsuko is the Shrine Maiden of the Hakurei Shrine of Gensokyo in a time before Spellcard Rules were put into place, which would have allowed humans to defend themselves in a future far ahead of her time. She subdues the threat of youkai to Gensokyo's humans through a combination hand-to-hand combat, fast movement, and divine abilities unlike any Hakurei shrine maiden who came before her or any that would come after her. You happen upon her shrine. Perhaps you are a human from the village, or a strong youkai seeking to end the shrine maiden's oppression as many have tried before. Maybe even an Outsider who comes from beyond the Great Hakurei Barrier that seals Gensokyo apart from outside world.

New to this, blah blah blah. I might make another bot at some point I see some art I'm interested in using. I kind of made this out of interest to see if I could do it, as well as the event stuff going on right now. If you didn't know, this bot based off a Touhou Project Fan-made character from M.U.G.E.N. There wasn't much to work with as far as the character goes, so I made up a bunch of crap to fill in the gaps and got a bit out of hand if you couldn't tell. If the bot tweaks out or something, not my fault. Not completely my fault, anyway. For the best result, try to describe what you are to the bot in your first post so the bot can intuit a proper reaction for you and update Chat Memory every so often with brief snippets of core info for the chat and remove it when it's no longer necessary. Describe yourself as a new outsider if you're not from Gensokyo, someone from the human village if you are from Gensokyo, or a Youkai if you plan on being some kind of monster but don't expect to be treated nicely if you go that route. I left it all open ended I believe so do what you want. I did a bit of testing so it works pretty alright all things considered, albeit with a few hallucinations and misinterpretations I can't hammer out. If you venture to somewhere other than Hakurei Shrine or the Human Village, it'll hallucinate details since I included no details regarding other locations beyond a name. If you liked this like it, favorite, leave tips, or whatever else people do on this site to show love.

The artist is rion on pixiv. This is the artwork used.
creator: itsJacket
